'''Ataria City''' was located on [[Ataria Island]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Spira/Legends|Spira]]. Settled along the beaches of the island's eastern coast, it was a thriving tourist location. The city's marina was the start and end point of the [[Spira Regatta Open]], a famous yacht race.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|1|The Spira Regatta|reprint=1}}
